results.title: Orlando Watters, Arkansas football star in early SEC years, dies at 54
results.description: Watters returned multiple punts and interceptions for touchdowns as a Razorback, and earned All-SEC in 1992.

results.title: Texas Teen Who Fatally Stabbed Track Athlete at School Meet Found Guilty and Sentenced to Prison
results.description: MCKINNEY, Texas (AP) — A Texas teenager who fatally stabbed a 17-year-old track athlete from a rival team during a high school meet was convicted of murder Tuesday and sentenced to 35 years in prison in a trial that drew attention far beyond the booming Dallas suburb where they were students.

results.title: Texas Teen Convicted of Murder for Stabbing Another Athlete at a High School Track Meet
results.description: MCKINNEY, Texas (AP) — A Texas teenager who fatally stabbed a 17-year-old track athlete from a rival team during a competition was convicted of murder Tuesday in a trial that drew attention far beyond the booming Dallas suburb where the two students attended different high schools.

results.title: Marnus Labuschagne edges closer to sad end as Australia crash to 21-year low against Bangladesh
results.description: The batsman’s career is hanging by a thread with the World Cup on the horizon.

results.title: StretchLab Creekside now open along Kuykendahl Road
results.description: StretchLab Creekside, an athletic center specializing in various forms of assisted stretching, officially opened its doors on May 29, General Manager Joanna Lerma confirmed.

results.title: GCW announces Joey Janela 20th anniversary show
results.description: Game Changer Wrestling is celebrating Joey Janela with a 20 anniversary show this summer. It was announced today that GCW will hold a “20 Years of Bad Boy” event in Asbury Park, New Jersey on Thursday, August 6. results.title: Netherlands national team opts for quiet start in its KC arrival for World Cup
results.description: Noa Lang and other members of the Netherlands men’s national team arrive at the Kansas City Downtown Airport ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

results.title: Spain, France qualify for 2027 Women's World Cup as England wait
results.description: World champions Spain and France booked their tickets to the 2027 Women's World Cup in Brazil on Tuesday, but England missed out on automatic qualification despite beating Ukraine.European champions England, who lost to Spain last week, finished second in their group despite beating Ukraine 3-0, and will have to navigate the play-offs to earn their ticket to Brazil.
